ew_context: Price finding support at Fibonacci 61.8% retracement level suggesting completion of corrective wave 2 or B wave structure
pattern_desc: Bounce from key Fibonacci 61.8% retracement at 4609.16. Golden ratio level historically significant for gold reversals
invalidation: Close below 4473.58 on D1 timeframe would break Fibonacci support structure
market_context: Gold finding support amid Iran tensions despite bond yield pressure. Safe haven demand supporting precious metals
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

XAUUSD is bouncing from the critical Fibonacci 61.8% retracement level at 4609.16, a historically significant golden ratio support. The retracement from recent highs at 4851.00 and 4879.70 has found buyers at this key technical level. Prior swing lows include 4100.80 and 4512.70, with current support representing a logical bounce point toward 4765.20 resistance.

RSI at oversold 38.8% provides room for recovery, though EMA20 at 4627.52 below EMA50 at 4689.69 maintains bearish short-term trend. High ATR of 67.79 reflects elevated volatility typical of major turning points. Turbulent flow conditions with momentum misalignment suggest conflicting institutional flows at this key level.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 4765.20 (prior structure), 4833.88 (measured target)
- **Support**: 4609.16 (Fib 61.8%), 4473.58 (invalidation)

## Invalidation Level

Close below 4473.58 on D1 timeframe would break the Fibonacci support structure and negate the bounce thesis.

## Macro & Flow Context

Geopolitical tensions in Iran provide safe haven support despite rising bond yields. Turbulent CFD flow reflects institutional uncertainty at key technical levels.
